scripts.build:static: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp -r public/. dist/
scripts.build:js: bun run build:bg && bun run build:cs
scripts.build: bun run build:static && bun run build:js
scripts.watch: concurrently --names bg,cs --kill-others 'bun run watch:bg' 'bun run watch:cs'
scripts.dev:firefox: bun run build && concurrently --names watch,firefox --kill-others 'bun run watch' 'bunx web-ext run --source-dir dist'
scripts.dev:chromium: bun run build && concurrently --names watch,chromium --kill-others 'bun run watch' 'bunx web-ext run --source-dir dist --target chromium'
scripts.dev: bun run build && concurrently --names watch,firefox,chromium --kill-others 'bun run watch' 'bunx web-ext run --source-dir dist' 'bunx web-ext run --source-dir dist --target chromium'
scripts.package: bun run build && bunx web-ext build --source-dir dist --artifacts-dir web-ext-artifacts --filename=link-mage-{version}.xpi --overwrite-dest
